title: New Media and Journalism Master's Program Mission and Vision
content:
New Media and Journalism Master's Program Mission and Vision

Mission

The area known as journalism in traditional communication education is fed by interdisciplinary understanding of various sciences within the scope of communication sciences and at the same time technological developments are made open to new scientific lanes and offered to the professionals who will grow in this field.

Vision

First, to lead academic studies to study the effects of new media on journalism, how it changes journalism, and how it transforms it at an academic level; and the second is to offer an attractive training program for media professionals who will do the journalism profession in the new media environment.
